title: Dakarash Tech
subtitle: Powered by Kargopath
description: A logistics technology platform that cuts through email & WhatsApp bureaucracy — from inquiry to tracking, all in one dashboard.

features.title: Instant Inquiry & Auto-Quotation
features.text: Clients enter cargo specifications and route, the system automatically processes official price quotations with no waiting time. No more back-and-forth emails or WhatsApp messages.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking & Visibility
features.text: Multi-modal journey visibility integration — monitor truck positions on land to barge coordinates at sea live, complete with estimated time of arrival (ETA).

features.title: Digital Document Hub
features.text: Centralized storage for Bill of Lading (B/L), Certificates of Origin (SKAB), customs documents, and digital invoices. No risk of lost or misplaced documents.

features.title: Data-Driven Analytics
features.text: Dashboard presenting monthly logistics spending trend reports and vendor on-time delivery (SLA) performance — helping corporate budget efficiency.

cta_text: Try the Kargopath platform yourself and get an instant quotation.
